scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie run build && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu run build && pnpm --dir products/aiq run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie run typecheck && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu run typecheck && pnpm --dir products/aiq run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie test && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu test && pnpm --dir products/aiq test
scripts.verify: pnpm --filter @tjalve/qube-cli run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aib run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aie run verify && pnpm --filter @tjalve/aiu run release:check && pnpm --dir products/aiq run build && pnpm --dir products/aiq test && pnpm --dir products/aiq run test:publish-readiness
scripts.verify:aiq: pnpm --dir products/aiq run build && pnpm --dir products/aiq test && pnpm --dir products/aiq run test:publish-readiness && pnpm --dir products/aiq run bench:ci
